data.title: Implement gate-2b-blast-radius.sh
data.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2b-blast-radius.sh. The script:
- Accepts: file paths (positional args), --repo-root (default: git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
- Convention heuristics (hardcoded patterns — this IS the convention set per story scope):
  - Package manifests: pyproject.toml, package.json, Gemfile, requirements.txt
  - CI/CD config: .github/workflows/*, .gitlab-ci.yml, Jenkinsfile
  - Schema/migration: migrations/*, schema.*, alembic/
  - Entry points: main.py, app.py, manage.py, index.js/ts
- Fan-in analysis:
  - Primary: ast-grep (if installed) for import counting
  - Fallback: grep-based (grep -rl "from.*module.*import\|import.*module")
- Gate signal JSON output:
  - gate_id "2b", signal_type "modifier" (ALWAYS modifier)
  - triggered: true when noteworthy (fan-in > 0 OR convention match), false when nothing found
  - evidence: plain-language annotation starting with "Note:" (e.g. "Note: pyproject.toml is a package manifest, imported by 3 modules")
  - Multi-convention: lists all matched conventions
  - No findings: triggered:false, evidence: empty string
- Always exits 0. Uses bash + grep + optional ast-grep.

Note: "conventions detected during onboarding" in Done Definition 1 refers to this hardcoded pattern set. Onboarding detects project stack but does not write runtime-readable convention files.

TDD: GREEN — implement until Task 1 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2b-blast-radius.sh
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-gate-2b-blast-radius.sh
- [ ] Script emits modifier signal type
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2b-blast-radius.sh /dev/null 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['signal_type']=='modifier'"
- [ ] bash -n syntax check
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2b-blast-radius.sh
